target: IELTS Full Test Visuals Feature - 8 Academic Sets with Real Visuals

summary.overall_result: All 30 backend tests passed. All 8 academic test sets (A-H) are returned by API. All 26 visual images are served correctly. Before/after paired visuals work for Set D (floor plan) and Set G (paired graphs). Listening map visuals configured for Sets C, F, G, H. Frontend QuestionBank code verified to have all 8 sets unlocked. FullTestInterface has correct visual rendering code.

features_tested.details: All 8 academic sets (A-H) returned with correct test_ids and descriptions
Sets A, B, F have single image visuals with correct image_url paths

features_tested.feature: Set D before/after floor plan comparison
features_tested.details: Has image_url=visual_005_floor_plan_library_before.png, image_url_after=visual_026_floor_plan_library_today.png, type=floor_plan_comparison, labels '20 years ago' and 'Today'

features_tested.feature: Set G before/after paired line graphs
Set C Listening Part 1 recreation ground map
features_tested.details: Has visual with image_url=visual_006_map_recreation_after.png, title='Recreation Ground Changes'

features_tested.feature: Set F Listening Part 2 Farley House map
Set G Listening Part 2 Stevenson's site plan
Set H Listening Part 2 Bidcaster dig map

features_tested.details: All 26 visual images (visual_001 through visual_026) return 200 status

features_tested.feature: New sets F, G, H audio files

features_tested.details: QuestionBank.js lines 819-828 define all 8 sets with correct IDs, labels, descriptions, and clickable cards (not Coming Soon)
Lines 1015-1048 correctly handle paired visuals with image_url and image_url_after, rendering side-by-side in 2-column grid with labels

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified - QuestionBank requires auth for live testing)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing academic test set data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 academic test sets (A-H) are fully configured with real visuals. 26 PNG files in /app/backend/static/visuals/. Set D and Set G have paired before/after visuals. Sets C, F, G, H have listening map visuals. Frontend QuestionBank shows all 8 sets as clickable (requires auth to view). FullTestInterface correctly renders both single and paired visuals.
